summary: Frontend E2E testing of Inventory Management (Envanter/Bestand) feature completed. All primary user flows PASS: admin sidebar nav-inventory ('Bestand' in DE) navigates to /envanter, empty-state hint shown, manual create with EUR currency, empty-name validation toast 'Name ist erforderlich', edit (name+buy price+stock updated), image upload via hidden inventory-image-file input with 'Bild hochgeladen' toast + preview URL populated, single delete via confirm(), bulk delete via select-all + inventory-bulk-delete-btn. Integration flows PASS: Catalog→Inventory transfer (catalog-to-inventory-btn) copies only name + image + sale_price; purchase_price and stock render as '—'; toast shows '+N'. ISOLATION verified: editing the inventory copy's name did NOT change the source catalog product's name, and the modified name is NOT visible in /teklifler product picker. Cleanup executed – inventory returned to empty state.

issues: The subtitle in /envanter renders 'Lagerbestand & Preisverfolgung · {N} ürün'. The word 'ürün' is hardcoded Turkish (Envanter.jsx line ~158) and appears even when UI language is Deutsch. Should be i18n-driven ('Produkte' for DE / 'ürün' for TR).

React console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}' on inventory-edit-dialog (also present on other dialogs). Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to improve accessibility.

action_items: Replace hardcoded 'ürün' in Envanter.jsx subtitle with i18n string (tx.productsCount or similar).
Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to inventory-edit-dialog (and consider fixing across other dialogs).
critical_code_review_comments: Envanter.jsx: subtitle text mixes locales – hardcoded 'ürün' even in DE. Small but user-visible in default DE admin language.

Envanter.jsx bulkDelete/deleteOne use window.confirm() which is a browser-native prompt; consistent with existing patterns but not styled. Consider replacing with the shadcn AlertDialog for consistency.
Envanter.jsx line 132: absolute URL construction using process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is correct; good pattern.
Envanter.jsx line 158: total count text mixes DE/TR – see design_issues.
Katalog.jsx moveToInventory: after successful transfer only clearSel() is called – no refresh needed for catalog, correct isolation behavior.
Inventory table headers/data-testids and dialog fields all have proper data-testid coverage – excellent testability.
seed_data_creation: Test data was created and cleaned up during the run: TEST_Manual_Espresso (+edited/uploaded/deleted), TEST_Bulk_A, TEST_Bulk_B, and one transferred catalog product ('Addis Ababa Coffee RB-286…' – renamed then deleted). Final inventory count = 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory Management (Envanter/Bestand) UI + Catalog→Inventory transfer + isolation regression verified end-to-end via Playwright against preview URL. Data-testids covered: nav-inventory, inventory-page, inventory-add-btn, inventory-edit-dialog, inventory-name, inventory-buy-price, inventory-sell-price, inventory-stock, inventory-currency, inventory-save-btn, inventory-image-file, inventory-image-upload-btn, inventory-image-url, inventory-edit-<id>, inventory-delete-<id>, inventory-check-<id>, inventory-select-all, inventory-bulk-bar, inventory-bulk-delete-btn, catalog-to-inventory-btn, catalog-check-<id>, catalog-row-<id>. Only design nits remain (subtitle Turkish word 'ürün' hardcoded, DialogDescription a11y warning).
